global_caption: A middle-aged woman in a leopard-print coat and a man in a blue suit are surrounded by a crowd of reporters and officials during a press conference, while a formal invitation letter is picked up from a wooden desk. The main characters include a middle-aged Caucasian woman with short, dark brown hair, wearing a leopard-print coat over a dark top. She is seen speaking to a crowd. Another prominent character is a middle-aged Caucasian man with short, dark, wavy hair, wearing a blue suit, white shirt, and dark tie. He is surrounded by a crowd of reporters and officials. The reporters include a man in a black fedora and glasses, and another man in a police-style cap. The officials are dressed in dark uniforms. In the final shots, a pair of hands, belonging to a person in a white shirt, picks up a white envelope from a wooden desk. The envelope has a red cross emblem, two postage stamps, and handwritten text in French. The text on the envelope reads: "Monsieur le Président de la République, Palais de l'Élysée, 55, rue du Montparnasse, Saint-Germain, Paris 1er arrond." two primary settings. The first is an indoor press conference setting, characterized by a formal and somewhat crowded atmosphere. The background consists of dark wood paneling with vertical gold trim. The lighting is warm and focused on the main characters. The second setting is an outdoor city street during the daytime. The background shows a blurry view of a building with windows and architectural details. The crowd of reporters and officials fills the space, creating a sense of a media scrum. The final shots take place indoors, showing a close-up of a dark wooden desk with a leather-bound portfolio on it. The lighting is warm and focused on the envelope. realistic. It has a movie-level style with a mix of natural and artificial lighting, creating a warm and slightly muted color tone. The overall visual aesthetic suggests a historical drama or period piece, with attention to detail in costumes and set design. The scene is characterized by medium saturation, moderate contrast, medium lightness and normal color temperature.
shot1: a close-up shot of a woman with dark, shoulder-length hair wearing a leopard-print coat. She is speaking with a serious expression, looking towards someone off-screen to her right. The camera slightly shakes, with a shallow depth of field. The lens is roughly at the same height as the woman, capturing a close-up of her front. The woman is positioned in the center of the frame.
shot2: The scene cuts to a man in a blue suit and tie, surrounded by a crowd of reporters and officials. He is speaking and gesturing with his hands, appearing to ask a question. The camera slightly shakes, with medium depth of field, and the lens is roughly at the same height as the subject. The camera captures a close-up of the man's front, who is positioned slightly to the right of the center of the frame.
shot3: The camera cuts back to the woman in the leopard-print coat, who is now standing in a crowd of reporters. She is speaking to someone in the crowd, while another woman in a large pink hat stands beside her. The camera slightly shakes, with medium depth of field, and the lens is roughly at the same height as the subject. The camera captures a close-up of the woman in leopard print clothing from the front, who is positioned slightly to the left of the center of the frame.
shot4: The scene cuts back to the man in the blue suit, who continues to speak with a questioning look on his face, surrounded by the press. The camera slightly shakes, with medium depth of field, and the lens is roughly at the same height as the subject. The camera captures a close-up of the man's front, who is positioned in the center of the frame.
shot5: The scene transitions to a close-up of a white envelope with a red cross emblem and two postage stamps, resting on a dark wooden desk. A pair of hands enters the frame and picks up the envelope. The camera pans slowly to the left, then tilts down to the right at a normal speed, and finally tilts up to the right at a normal speed. The camera captures a close-up of the envelope from a higher angle, with a medium depth of field. The envelope is positioned slightly to the left of the center of the frame.
